name: INDIANOIL AXIS BANK Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under IndianOil Axis Bank Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on spending more than Rs 3.5 lakh in a card anniversary year, excluding rent, wallet load, EMI, cash withdrawals, fees, charges, GST and other excluded spends
additionalBenefits: Up to 1,250 EDGE REWARD Points on first fuel transaction within 30 days of card issuance
20 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 100 at IndianOil outlets in India on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000
5 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 100 on online shopping
1 EDGE REWARD Point per Rs 100 on other eligible spends
10% instant discount on BookMyShow movie tickets
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions, capped at Rs 50 per statement cycle
Dining Delights offers through Axis Bank dining programme
RuPay variant supports credit card UPI payments where enabled

salaried: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
